meaning: n.可乐树(产于热带非洲,西印度群岛,巴西等地)
examples: When cocaine eventually fell from grace as a beverage ingredient, kola-extract colas became popular.
A kola is resting on the trunk.
The kangroo and kola bear from Austrilia are very famous.
Have lunch at the rickety townhouse that hides Antika (Donja Kola), serving Adriatic staples such as squid ink risotto.
The purpose was to meet with the owner of local soft drink Inca Kola, which Coca-Cola wanted to acquire.
